:root{ --navy:#1D3461; --navy-dark:#142345; --gold:#F2C14E; --cream:#F4ECD8; --court:#8B6F47; --white:#FFFFFF; } *{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box;} body{ font-family:'Inter',sans-serif; background:var(--cream); color:var(--navy-dark); line-height:1.7; } img{max-width:100%;display:block;} /* ===== HERO: JERSEY PHOTO CARD ===== */ .hero{ background:var(--navy); min-height:100vh; display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; justify-content:center; text-align:center; padding:60px 20px; position:relative; overflow:hidden; } .hero::before{ content:""; position:absolute; inset:0; background: repeating-linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(242,193,78,0.04) 0px, rgba(242,193,78,0.04) 2px, transparent 2px, transparent 40px); } .jersey-frame{ position:relative; z-index:1; max-width:480px; width:100%; } .jersey-frame .eyebrow{ color:var(--gold); font-size:0.85rem; letter-spacing:0.3em; font-weight:600; margin-bottom:22px; } .jersey-photo-wrap{ position:relative; border:6px solid var(--gold); border-radius:18px; overflow:hidden; box-shadow:0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.4); background:var(--navy-dark); } .jersey-photo-wrap img{ width:100%; display:block; object-fit:cover; } .age-badge{ position:absolute; bottom:18px; right:18px; background:var(--navy); border:4px solid var(--gold); border-radius:50%; width:96px; height:96px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; font-family:'Anton',sans-serif; color:var(--gold); font-size:2.3rem; box-shadow:0 8px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.45); } .jersey-frame .sub{ margin-top:26px; color:var(--cream); font-family:'Anton',sans-serif; font-size:clamp(1.6rem, 6vw, 2.4rem); letter-spacing:0.1em; } .jersey-frame .sub2{ margin-top:8px; color:var(--gold); font-size:0.9rem; letter-spacing:0.25em; } .scroll-hint{ margin-top:40px; color:var(--gold); font-size:0.85rem; letter-spacing:0.2em; z-index:1; } /* ===== SECTION SHARED ===== */ section{ padding:90px 20px; max-width:980px; margin:0 auto; } .section-head{ text-align:center; margin-bottom:60px; } .section-head .tag{ display:inline-block; font-family:'Anton',sans-serif; font-size:0.85rem; letter-spacing:0.3em; color:var(--court); border:2px solid var(--court); padding:6px 18px; border-radius:999px; margin-bottom:18px; } .section-head h2{ font-family:'Anton',sans-serif; font-size:clamp(1.8rem, 6vw, 2.8rem); color:var(--navy); letter-spacing:0.05em; } /* ===== TEAM / LETTERS - LOCKER TAG STYLE ===== */ .roster{ display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit, minmax(220px, 1fr)); gap:28px; } .player-card{ background:var(--navy); border-radius:14px; overflow:hidden; cursor:pointer; transition:transform 0.25s ease, box-shadow 0.25s ease; position:relative; display:flex; flex-direction:column; box-shadow:0 8px 0 var(--court); } .player-card:hover{ transform:translateY(-6px); box-shadow:0 14px 0 var(--gold); } .player-card .photo{ aspect-ratio:1/1; background:linear-gradient(135deg, var(--court), #6b5536); display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; color:var(--cream); font-family:'Anton',sans-serif; font-size:0.9rem; letter-spacing:0.1em; overflow:hidden; position:relative; } .player-card .photo img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;} .player-card .photo .ph-number{ font-family:'Anton',sans-serif; font-size:4rem; color:rgba(244,236,216,0.25); position:absolute; } .player-card .label{ padding:14px 16px 18px; text-align:left; border-top:3px dashed var(--gold); } .player-card .label .role{ display:block; font-size:0.7rem; letter-spacing:0.25em; color:var(--gold); margin-bottom:4px; } .player-card .label .name{ font-family:'Anton',sans-serif; font-size:1.25rem; letter-spacing:0.05em; color:var(--cream); } .player-card .label .open-msg{ margin-top:8px; display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:6px; font-size:0.7rem; letter-spacing:0.15em; color:var(--navy-dark); background:var(--gold); padding:5px 12px; border-radius:999px; font-weight:700; } /* ===== LETTER MODAL - TICKET STYLE ===== */ .modal-overlay{ position:fixed; inset:0; background:rgba(20,35,69,0.85); display:none; align-items:center; justify-content:center; padding:20px; z-index:100; backdrop-filter:blur(4px); } .modal-overlay.active{display:flex;} .letter{ background:var(--cream); max-width:560px; width:100%; max-height:85vh; overflow-y:auto; border-radius:14px; padding:0; position:relative; box-shadow:0 25px 70px rgba(0,0,0,0.5); } .letter-header{ background:var(--navy); padding:28px 36px; position:relative; overflow:hidden; } .letter-header::after{ content:""; position:absolute; right:-30px; top:-30px; width:140px; height:140px; border:10px solid var(--gold); border-radius:50%; opacity:0.15; } .letter .from{ font-family:'Anton',sans-serif; color:var(--gold); font-size:1.8rem; letter-spacing:0.08em; position:relative; z-index:1; } .letter .from-role{ font-size:0.75rem; letter-spacing:0.25em; color:var(--cream); opacity:0.7; margin-top:4px; text-transform:uppercase; position:relative; z-index:1; } .letter-body-wrap{ padding:36px; } .letter .body-text{ white-space:pre-line; color:#3a3a3a; font-size:1.02rem; } .letter .signoff{ margin-top:28px; font-family:'Anton',sans-serif; color:var(--navy); text-align:right; } .close-btn{ position:absolute; top:16px; right:16px; width:36px; height:36px; border-radius:50%; border:none; background:var(--gold); color:var(--navy-dark); font-size:1.2rem; cursor:pointer; line-height:1; z-index:2; font-weight:700; } /* ===== SLIDESHOW - AUTO MARQUEE GRID ===== */ .slideshow{ background:var(--navy); border-radius:18px; padding:36px 0; text-align:center; overflow:hidden; } .marquee-row{ display:flex; gap:16px; width:max-content; } .marquee-row.row2{ margin-top:16px; animation-direction:reverse; } .marquee-track{ animation:scroll-left 60s linear infinite; } .marquee-row.row2 .marquee-track{ animation:scroll-right 70s linear infinite; } @keyframes scroll-left{ from{transform:translateX(0);} to{transform:translateX(-50%);} } @keyframes scroll-right{ from{transform:translateX(-50%);} to{transform:translateX(0);} } .marquee-track{ display:flex; gap:16px; } .slide-item{ flex:0 0 auto; width:200px; aspect-ratio:1/1; border-radius:10px; overflow:hidden; border:3px solid var(--gold); background:linear-gradient(135deg,#2a4a8a,#142345); display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; } .slide-item img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;object-position:center top;} .slide-item .placeholder{ color:var(--cream); font-family:'Anton',sans-serif; font-size:1rem; letter-spacing:0.1em; } @media (max-width:600px){ .slide-item{width:140px;} } /* ===== FOOTER ===== */ footer{ text-align:center; padding:50px 20px 70px; color:var(--court); font-size:0.85rem; letter-spacing:0.15em; } footer .num{ font-family:'Anton',sans-serif; color:var(--navy); font-size:1.4rem; letter-spacing:0.1em; } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce){ .player-card, .slide-controls button{transition:none;} }
